name: Rice Kugel
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cream Cheese, cut into cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk in a 2-quart saucepan; add cream cheese, cottage cheese, and 1/4 cup butter. Stir until smooth; cool slightly.
2. Add sugar, orange and lemon peel; mix well.
3. Beat eggs and stir into the cream mixture.
4. Stir in rice; pour into a greased 8x8x2-inch baking dish.
5. Combine rice cereal and brown sugar; sprinkle over the rice mixture.
6. Pour remaining 1/4 cup melted butter over top.
7. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes, or until center is barely set.
